entity.summary: Plasma-native decentralized exchange and on-chain liquidity marketplace built around a vote-escrowed 3,3 model.
entity.notes: First-party documentation describes active swap, liquidity, incentive, and governance products on Plasma. Independent protocol data reports current non-zero TVL, fees, and recent DEX volume. The main application URL is retained as live_unverified because direct response verification was blocked during review. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is inferred.

evidence.title: Lithos official documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Lithos as a 3,3 decentralized exchange on Plasma and describes its swaps, liquidity pools, emissions, and governance surfaces.

evidence.title: Lithos protocol profile and trading metrics
evidence.notes: Independent protocol data identifies Lithos as a Plasma-native on-chain liquidity marketplace and reports current non-zero TVL, fees, revenue, and recent DEX volume.
